name: NDMA SACHET India CAP RSS
notes: Official India CAP RSS feed listed for National Disaster Management Authority of India in the WMO Register of Alerting Authorities.

name: India Meteorological Department CAP RSS
notes: Public CAP alert feed attributed to India Meteorological Department and listed in WMO/IMD documentation.

name: India Meteorological Department District Nowcast RSS
notes: Public IMD district nowcast feed documented by IMD. Parsed as candidate weather evidence and subject to freshness/location rules.

name: PIB Fact Check public portal
notes: Official PIB Fact Check portal. The public landing page may require login or CAPTCHA; AEGIS only accepts dated, parsed public advisory text and never automates a user submission or bypasses access controls.

name: Goa State Disaster Management Authority public advisories
notes: Initial state-source adapter for the official Goa SDMA public site. It is opt-in because page structure and publication dates can change.

name: Meghalaya State Disaster Management Authority public advisories
notes: Initial state-source adapter for the official Meghalaya SDMA public site. It is opt-in because page structure and publication dates can change.
